prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Find all C++ source files in mozilla/gecko-dev that implement the CSS layout engine reflow pipeline: the frame construction, the block layout reflow, and the dirty-frame invalidation mechanism.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the mozilla-firefox fixture.
